candidate_definitions.text: NExT-QA: Next Phase of Question-Answering to Explaining Temporal Actions (CVPR'21)

We reproduce some SOTA VideoQA methods to provide benchmark results for our NExT-QA dataset accepted to CVPR2021. NExT-QA is a VideoQA benchmark targeting the explanation of video contents. It challenges QA models to reason about the causal and temporal actions and understand th…
